title: 3D Music Discs
description: All music discs up to 1.21 have a 3D model when in first person but a 2D texture in your inventory
body:
Finally! All of the music discs are now 3D when in your first person hand but 2D when in your inventory! All without needing a single mod for it to work! Using features added recent snapshots you can get your hands on 3D music discs!

This resource pack is under the CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 license, which in short means its a Creative Commons resource pack. You're free to use this resource pack in your resource packs as long as you release them under the same license, give credit where credit is due, and make zero profit off of the resource pack!
